summary: Completed testing of 3-level hierarchy admin panel (Cursus -> Cours -> Modules -> Audios). All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: bulk toggle actions, navigation links, cursus filter, and audio-module linking all functional. Fixed a bug where courses filter used wrong field name (thematique_id vs cursus_id).

minor.issue: Duplicate CourseCreate model definitions at lines 210 and 312 - could cause confusion

action_items: Consider removing duplicate CourseCreate model definition in server.py
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate CourseCreate class definitions at lines 210 and 312 in server.py - Python uses the last definition so this works but is confusing
seed_data_creation: TEST_CURSUS_* and TEST_COURSE_* test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel 3-level hierarchy (Cursus -> Cours -> Modules -> Audios) fully functional. Bulk toggle APIs work on all 3 levels. Audio form has module linking with episode number. Navigation between levels via count links works correctly. Fixed courses filter to check both cursus_id and thematique_id for compatibility.

Page Cursus - Liste les 7 cursus avec co.details: Shows 7+ cursus with course counts (e.g., '20 cours', '5 cours'). Count links navigate to filtered courses page.

Page Cursus - Actions groupées (sélectio.details: Checkboxes visible, bulk actions bar appears on selection with 'Activer'/'Désactiver' buttons. API /admin/cursus/bulk-toggle works correctly.

Page Cours - Liste les cours avec compte.details: Shows courses with module count badges. Displays parent cursus name in CURSUS column.

Page Cours - Actions groupées (bulk togg.details: Bulk actions bar with activate/deactivate buttons. API /admin/courses/bulk-toggle tested and working.

Page Cours - Filtre par cursus.details: Filter dropdown works. Fixed compatibility issue to check both cursus_id and thematique_id.

Page Modules - Liste les modules avec co.details: Modules page shows module list with parent course links, episode counts, and scholar names.

Page Modules - Actions groupées (bulk to.details: Bulk actions bar present. API /admin/modules/bulk-toggle tested and working.

Page Modules - Filtre par cours.details: Course filter dropdown present and functional.

Page Audios - Liaison aux modules (au li.details: Audio form has 'Module associé' dropdown and 'N° Épisode' field for linking audios to modules.

Navigation sidebar mise à jour avec Curs.details: Sidebar shows Cursus, Cours, Modules, Audios navigation links in correct order under 'CONTENU' section.

API /api/admin/cursus/bulk-toggle.details: Tested with 3 cursus - activates/deactivates multiple items correctly.

API /api/admin/courses/bulk-toggle.details: Tested with 2 courses - activates/deactivates multiple items correctly.

API /api/admin/modules/bulk-toggle.details: Tested with 2 modules - activates/deactivates multiple items correctly.

courses_filter_bug.description: Courses filter was only checking thematique_id but courses have cursus_id. Fixed to check both fields for compatibility.
courses_filter_bug.fix_applied: Updated getFilteredCourses() to check c.cursus_id || c.thematique_id and getThematiqueName() to accept course object
